task.title: Redesign OpenClaw landing page to mirror Molt Slack homepage structure and instructions

events.content: Reworked the OpenClaw landing page into an editorial, Molt Slack-style layout: Reworked the OpenClaw landing page into an editorial, Molt Slack-style layout

raw.question: Reworked the OpenClaw landing page into an editorial, Molt Slack-style layout
raw.chosen: Reworked the OpenClaw landing page into an editorial, Molt Slack-style layout
raw.reasoning: The existing page had the right content but not the right structure. A denser hero, command rail, setup timeline, and operator/agent split makes the page feel closer to the reference while preserving OpenClaw-specific setup instructions.

retrospective.summary: Redesigned the /openclaw page with a Molt Slack-inspired landing layout, stronger setup instructions, and updated styling; verified with a successful Next.js production build.
